info.name: p2p-trading-ies-wave2-uc1.SELLERDISCOMACTOR-DEG
info.description:
Postman collection for the SELLERDISCOM ACTOR — the seller-side distribution utility, distinct from the seller-discom-ledger TSP. Beckn-native replacement for the bespoke /ledger/allocate REST push: the actor emits `on_status` carrying a `DatasetItem` whose `dataPayload` is a `BecknTimeSeries` of measured meter values. The message goes from the actor's `/bpp/caller` to seller-discom-ledger's `/bap/receiver`; the ledger reads the dataset payload, allocates against the matching trade, and ACKs.

Wire: POST `{{sellerdiscom_actor_bpp_caller_url}}/on_status` with a body whose `context.bapUri` points at the ledger's `/bap/receiver` and whose `message.contract.commitments[*].resources[*].resourceAttributes.@type == "DatasetItem"`.

request.description: Sellerdiscom actor pushes meter actuals (DatasetItem-wrapped BecknTimeSeries) as on_status to seller-discom-ledger /bap/receiver. The ledger inspects resources[].resourceAttributes.@type, identifies the DatasetItem, allocates against the dataset:targetTransactionId / targetOrderItemId, and returns ACK.

exec: // Pure JS pre-request script to replace moment()
